scripts.build: npm run build --prefix packages/database && npm run build --prefix apps/api && npm run build --prefix apps/admin-web
scripts.ci:install: npm ci --prefix packages/database && npm ci --prefix apps/api && npm ci --prefix apps/admin-web
scripts.build:render: npm ci --prefix packages/database --include=dev && npm ci --prefix apps/api --include=dev && npm run build --prefix packages/database && npm run db:push --prefix packages/database && npm run build --prefix apps/api
